g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the FinFlow client and how it interacts with the API Gateway')
sendPrompt('Explain the API Gateway role in FinFlow — JWT validation, routing, and role-based access')
g.text: JWT validate · Role check · Route · Inject X-Auth headers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Eureka Server do in FinFlow?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Auth Service in FinFlow — registration, login, JWT generation')
sendPrompt('Explain the Application Service in FinFlow — loan apply, status, RabbitMQ producer')
sendPrompt('Explain the Admin Service in FinFlow — approve, reject, Feign client to Application Service')

sendPrompt('What is stored in the Application Service Oracle database?')
sendPrompt('How does RabbitMQ work in FinFlow? What messages are sent and who consumes them?')

svg.text: Ports: Eureka 8761 · Gateway 9090 · Auth 9091 · Application 9092 · Document 9093 · Admin 9094 · RabbitMQ 5672
Roles: USER → apply loan, view own loans ADMIN → approve, reject, delete, view all
